chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-05 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case. 08-11-2023 Petitioner is present in person. Mr. Shoukat Ali Chaudhry, Advocate for respondents. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** Naseer Ahmed Naich (petitioner) present in person submits that his grievance has been redressed, hence he does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
